name: Good Fruit Spice Cake: God Mjuk Pepparkaka
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Pillsbury's Best All Purpose Flour, sifted
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Sift together the flour, baking powder, salt, and spices.
3. Beat eggs until foamy. Gradually add sugars and continue beating until thick and ivory colored.
4. Fold in raisins and 1 cup chopped Funsten's nuts, then half the dry ingredients until well combined.
5. Add light cream, then the remaining dry ingredients. Mix until just blended.
6. Pour batter into a greased 9 or 10-inch tube pan or 9 x 5 x 3-inch loaf pan coated with half the chopped nuts or cake crumbs.
7. Bake in the moderate oven for 50 to 60 minutes.
8. Cool in the pan for 15 minutes, then invert onto a wire rack.
